name: python3-numpy
title: python3-numpy
description:
Python library for numerical computations (Python 3)
NumPy contains a powerful N-dimensional array object, sophisticated
(broadcasting) functions, tools for integrating C/C++ and Fortran
code, and useful linear algebra, Fourier transform, and random number
capabilities.
.
This package installs NumPy for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use f2py because Python library for numerical computations (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use f2py as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `f2py [options] [args]` as documented upstream for f2py.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair f2py with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `f2py --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
